title: Section 72
content: [References to Judicial Magistrate of the first class in sections 108, 109 and 110 of the Code of Criminal Procedure, 1973 not to be construed as references to an Executive Magistrate.] Omitted by the Code of Criminal Procedure (Amendment) Act, 1980 (63 of 1980), s. 9 (w.e.f. 23-9-1980).
